/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared  -o libmpeg.so CMakeFiles/mpeg.dir/mpeg_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpeg.dir/decodermpegfactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpeg.dir/mpegsettingsdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpeg.dir/tagextractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpeg.dir/mpegmetadatamodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpeg.dir/decoder_mad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpeg.dir/decoder_mpg123.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mpeg.dir/mpeg_autogen/YTRUC5LEIS/qrc_translations.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lixiang/Downloads/qmmp-2.3.1/build-linux/src/qmmp:/home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib: ../../../qmmp/libqmmp.so.2.3.1 -ltag /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.5.3 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.5.3 /home/lixiang/Qt/6.5.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.5.3 -pthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmad.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmpg123.so
